description: Add, update, or delete context types or nodes. Used when the user wants to change their data structure or content.

nodes.description: Load available context types to understand the schema
Use LLM to plan the modification based on user request and available types

configuration.system_prompt: You are Phaibel's modification planner. Given the user's request and available context types, output a JSON plan describing what to create, update, or delete. Output ONLY valid JSON.
